markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to provide a Looker Studio report for tracking blog performance instead of modifying URL slugs](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Rapyd to review and provide relevance feedback on existing blog content for potential pruning/updating](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [New standardized CTAs to be created for main product categories (payments, payouts, accounts, all-in-one solution)](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Process change: Rapyd to receive blog content as CSV/JSON file for easier WordPress integration](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Tracking

  - [Mark initially considered adding "-GX" to blog post slugs for easier tracking in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Jakub advised against modifying URLs for SEO reasons](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Aida proposed using Looker Studio report with manually added URLs to track GrowthX content performance](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Team agreed to use Looker Studio approach and explore potential GA4 workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Jakub identified opportunities to improve conversion sections at the bottom of blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Discussed adding product-specific content to increase conversions on high-traffic pages](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Noted overall decline in blog traffic (6-8 months), partially due to AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Proposed refreshing high-performing articles that have seen traffic drops](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Relevance and Pruning

  - [Mark emphasized the need to focus on content relevant to mid to enterprise-level merchants and partners](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Jakub suggested a pruning exercise to remove irrelevant or low-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Agreed to create a spreadsheet for Mark to review blog relevance (Yes/No/Maybe)](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Will include traffic and conversion data to inform decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Aim to improve crawl budget and search engine understanding of Rapyd's focus](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

### Standardized CTAs

  - [Decision to create general CTAs for main product categories:](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
    1.  Payments
    2.  Payouts
    3.  Multi-currency business accounts
    4.  Rapyd's all-in-one solution
  - [Nicolette assigned to draft these CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [GrowthX to integrate these into their content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

### Content Delivery Process

  - [New process: GrowthX to deliver blog content as CSV/JSON file](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Rapyd to implement WordPress plugin for automated blog post creation from the file](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Aida to update Airtable with publish dates and live URLs once blogs are published](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to create spreadsheet for blog content review, including traffic and conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Mark to review and provide relevance feedback on existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Nicolette to create standardized CTAs for main product categories](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Rapyd IT team to implement WordPress plugin for CSV/JSON blog import](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate product documentation and POV into future blog content](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
  - [Continue weekly syncs and communicate via Slack for ongoing updates](https://fathom.video/share/fzHNhspMmans_tx8NgKsDnH26gpJSXkF?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
